original_image_tags: Large red stamp "AIRTEL" at bottom left of form.
Purple stamp, partially legible: "BEG... NAT. INT. SEC." with signature line and illegible initials.
Purple date stamp at bottom left: "25 APR 12 1960"
Another purple date stamp overlapping the first at bottom left: "25 APR 21 1960"
Handwritten note in bottom right corner: "EK-107"

elements.description: A faint red stamp near the center containing partially legible text including 'ALL INFORMATION CONTAINED... ORIGIN UNCLASSIFIED' and a date that appears to be '5/1/85'.

judge.reason: Description A details multiple specific stamps and a handwritten note at defined locations, while Description B describes a single, faint, different red stamp with entirely different text and location, indicating the two descriptions are of different visual content.
